text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
That comes to an even ninety-nine! The question
is, of what?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
The answer is the total number of coconuts I split
with my bare hands during summer camp!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
And since you got it wrong, your punishment is to
walk all the way back to the academy! See ya!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I race to the bus before it can leave without me.
